name: Potato Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1 small Cooked potato; Salt to taste;
recipeInstructions:
1. Break up and mash the cooked potato.
2. Add the egg and ground fresh pepper to the mashed potato.
3. Gradually add flour, mixing until light and fluffy.
4. Form the mixture into tablespoon-sized dumplings.
5. Place dumplings on top of boiling salted water or beef broth.
6. Boil for 5 minutes or until dumplings rise to the surface.
Good with Sauerbraten.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 MEAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 140 Makes 3 to 4 dumplings
